headline: Is It Time To Revisit Progressive (PGR) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Progressive is priced attractively right now, the starting point is understanding how its current share price lines up with a range of valuation checks. The stock last closed at US$198.84, with returns of 3.1% decline over 7 days, 6.9% decline over 30 days, 6.3% decline year to date, 25.2% decline over 1 year, 50.0% gain over 3 years and 130.0% gain over 5 years. This gives you a mixed picture of recent and longer term performance. Recent headlines around...
